# Irfan Rakasiwi Pasman

> Video Editor & Hand-Creative Professional based in Medan, Indonesia

Irfan Rakasiwi Pasman is a freelance video editor with 7+ years of experience (active since 2019). He specializes in cinematic property videos, personal branding content, and commercial industry productions. He has completed over 100 projects.

## Contact
- Email: irfanrakasiwipasman@gmail.com
- WhatsApp: +62 851-6118-6051
- Location: Medan, Sumatera Utara, Indonesia
